## Learning Sequence Rules

- **Foundations (1–5)**: Chapter 1 assumes no prior knowledge. Each subsequent chapter may assume all previous chapters.
- **Applications (6–10)**: May assume all Foundations chapters. Focus on practical use of core concepts.
- **Production (11–15)**: May assume all Foundations and Applications chapters. Focus on real-world deployment and trade-offs.

Advanced topics (e.g., quantization, RLHF internals, distributed training) belong in Production, not Foundations.
